visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a bright, well-lit Costco warehouse supermarket. A young woman, wearing a black beret, a black mesh top over a dark bra, and light-colored pants, holds a large circular plastic container filled with various braised food items. She smiles and looks directly at the camera, gesturing towards the platter. In the background, refrigerated shelves filled with prepared food and a few distant shoppers are visible. (2) The camera provides a top-down, high-detail close-up shot of the braised food platter. The container is divided into compartments containing peanuts, dried tofu, and several types of sliced meats including pig stomach and pig ears. The lighting is crisp, making the fatty glisten and distinct textures of the food highly visible. Large text overlays appear frequently. (3) The setting changes to a warmly lit indoor home environment, likely a dining or living room. Two young women sit side-by-side behind a table where the same braised food platter is placed. One woman wears a white and black patterned bucket hat. They use chopsticks to pick up pieces of food, tasting them and reacting with animated facial expressions and hand gestures. Behind them, a simple wall and a yellow stuffed toy are visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 請問一個少女拿著滷水拼盤做什麼. (2) [Variety]: 滷水拼盤. [Variety]: 好市多新品. [Subtitle]: 好市多怎麼會賣這個. (3) [Variety]: 有7種料. [Slogan]: 512元. [Slogan]: 一公斤618元還OK啦. (4) [Subtitle]: 滷水拼盤一盤512元. [Subtitle]: 它總共有這個豬肚, 豬耳朵, 大腸跟滷豆干, 滷土豆跟豬腱. (5) [Variety]: 跟花生融合的很剛好. [Variety]: 非常甜. [Variety]: 油潑辣子. [Variety]: 豬耳朵.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in the background of the first scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One young woman has long dark hair and wears a black beret with a dark grey outfit. The other woman has short hair and wears a distinctive black and white patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a commercial warehouse supermarket (Costco) with shelves of prepared food. The second location is a domestic living room with a dining table and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop background music track with a clear 4/4 beat. A bright-toned female voice narrating in Mandarin provides an enthusiastic introduction to the Costco product. Frequent 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are used as sonic markers whenever variety-show style text appears on screen. (2) As the visual shifts to the food close-up, the voice continues with a fast speech rate, detailing the price and weight of the platter. The background music remains consistent in volume and tempo. No significant background noise is heard, suggesting clean field recording with post-production cleanup. (3) The audio transitions to a two-person conversation. Two female voices interact with a casual and humorous tone. The sounds of wooden chopsticks clinking against the plastic platter and occasional chewing sounds are clearly audible, mixed slightly lower than the voices. The BGM continues to provide an energetic atmosphere throughout the discussion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Tasting Session -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and recommend a new large-scale braised food platter from Costco, highlighting its variety of ingredients and value for money through a direct tasting and vlog-style commentary.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video presents as a personal consumer review rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-energy social media food review focusing on a warehouse store specialty product.
